label: Map portal properties
description: Properties for map portal things that act as entry or exit points between maps.

minPossibleMapSize.label: Min possible map size
minPossibleMapSize.description: Minimum map dimension (in cells) of the destination map.

maxPossibleMapSize.label: Max possible map size
maxPossibleMapSize.description: Maximum map dimension (in cells) of the destination map.

mapTypeGateways.label: Map type gateways
mapTypeGateways.description: If true, this portal can lead to gateway-type maps.

mapTypeEncounters.label: Map type encounters
mapTypeEncounters.description: If true, this portal can lead to encounter-type maps.

mapTypeSites.label: Map type sites
mapTypeSites.description: If true, this portal can lead to site-type maps.
